lever: Order-preserving single-slot helper for duplicate Mul VJP cotangent accumulation.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-9p65w-baseline-$(date +%s) cargo bench -p fj-ad --bench ad_baseline -- 'ad/grad_sum_x2_plus_x_1k' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

rejection_reason: RCH did not provide a same-worker after run despite worker preference env vars. Cross-worker after runs are not acceptable keep evidence, so the source change was reverted.
next_attack: If revisited, get a same-worker baseline/after pair first or move deeper to a compiled reverse-mode vector-reduction primitive with an explicit profile target.
